title: Creating a Members CRM
excerpt:
We’re creating a membership programme for our NPO and want to capture the information from Google Sheets into the Members CRM board. 
Is it as simple as just creating the same field as per the column headers from Sheets? …

posts.author: jacokoe (Jaco)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re creating a membership programme for our NPO and want to capture the information from Google Sheets into the Members CRM board.

Is it as simple as just creating the same field as per the column headers from Sheets?
Ultimately we’d like to manage our engagement with our members via this board.

posts.author: Axel1 (Barbé--Husson)
posts.cookedHtml: Totaly for me it’s better to name all of your column like you need
